title: FastMathFabric
description: This mod changes math to replicate OptiFine's Fast Math feature
body:
FastMathFabric replicates OptiFine's Fast Math feature as a Fabric mod. It is incompatible with Lithium and OptiFabric.

Note: the "SmallAngleMath" file is even more cursed - instead of OptiFine's Fast Math, it replaces the math with the small-angle approximation (sin x = x, cos x = 1)
